title: f/prompts.chat
summary: 社区驱动的ChatGPT提示词分享与发现平台
raw_content: f/prompts.chat: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy. (stars: 162,798 | lang: HTML | topics: ai, artificial-intelligence, awesome-list, chatgpt, chatgpt-prompts, claude, gemini, gpt, gpt-4, llm, machine-learning, nextjs, open-source, openai, prompt-engineering, prompts, prompts-chat, typescript)

key_points: 拥有162,798星标的开源提示词社区平台
支持ChatGPT、Claude、Gemini等多种LLM提示词分享
可自托管部署，保障组织隐私安全
analysis.impact: 作为最受欢迎的提示词工程社区项目之一，显著降低了LLM使用门槛并促进了提示词知识的共享与协作。
